app_subtitle: YouTube · Facebook · Instagram · TikTok · BiliBili · 500+ platforms
urls_caption: Supports: YouTube · Facebook · Instagram · TikTok · BiliBili · Twitter · SoundCloud · Twitch · Vimeo · 500+
cookie_warning: Douyin, private TikTok / Instagram and similar platforms require cookies to download.
cookie_m1_hint: ← Select the browser you are signed in with
cookie_export_hint:
💡  How to export cookies.txt:
   Chrome / Edge / Brave: install "Get cookies.txt LOCALLY" extension → open the site → Export
   Firefox: install the "cookies.txt" extension → Export
   Or just pick a browser above and yt-dlp will read its cookies directly (requires being signed in).
log_auto_toggle: 📄  Auto-save log after each download session
log_fmt_note: 💡  Log will be saved as download_log_YYYYMMDD_HHMMSS.txt in the selected directory.
cv_ffmpeg_notice: ⚠  Conversion requires ffmpeg installed and added to PATH.  →  https://ffmpeg.org
msg_no_url_body: Please enter at least one URL.
msg_same_fmt_body: Source and destination formats are the same.
msg_log_empty_body: No log entries to save. Please run a download first.
log_no_ffmpeg: [{i}/{t}]  ✗  ffmpeg not found — install from https://ffmpeg.org
log_save_failed_dir: ⚠  Log save failed: directory not found — {path}
web_url_placeholder: Paste one or more URLs (one per line)…
web_footer: Multimedia Downloader · Run locally or deploy online
ai_api_key_hint: Stored locally on this device only. Get one at openrouter.ai/keys.
ai_prompt_placeholder: e.g. Convert every .mkv in D:\videos to mp4
ai_no_key: Enter your OpenRouter API key in Settings first.
ai_no_tasks: No runnable tasks in this plan.
ai_mock_notice: Preview mode — plans are simulated, no API key needed.
mock_banner: Preview mode — mock engine, no real downloads
ai_example_4: Convert D:\videos\a.mov and D:\videos\b.avi to mp4
ai_safety_note: Review the plan — nothing runs until you press Confirm.
manual_intro: A quick reference for the basics. For the full guide, FAQ, and troubleshooting, see the online Wiki (link at the bottom).
manual_sec_download_body:
1. Open the Video or Music tab.
2. Paste one or more URLs, one per line — batches are supported.
3. Pick a format and quality.
4. Choose a save location.
5. Click Start Download.

Supports 500+ sites via yt-dlp: YouTube, Facebook, Instagram, TikTok, BiliBili, Twitter, SoundCloud, Twitch, Vimeo, and more.
manual_sec_convert_body:
1. Open the Convert tab.
2. Add one or more local files.
3. Choose the target format.
4. Choose a save location.
5. Click Start Convert.

Conversion runs on the bundled ffmpeg — no separate install needed.
manual_sec_cookies_body:
Some platforms (Douyin, private TikTok/Instagram, etc.) require a login cookie to download.

• Easiest: pick the browser you're logged into from the dropdown — it's read automatically.
• Manual: export cookies.txt with a browser extension (e.g. "Get cookies.txt LOCALLY") and point the app at the file.
manual_sec_log_body: Shows every download/convert event as it happens, with level filters (info/ok/warn/err). Turn on auto-save to write the log to a .txt file after each session.
manual_sec_ai_body:
Click the AI Assistant button (or press Ctrl/Cmd+K) and describe a task in plain language, e.g. "convert every .mkv in this folder to mp4."

You'll need your own free OpenRouter API key (stored only on this device). The assistant drafts a plan and shows it to you — nothing runs until you click Confirm.
manual_sec_settings_body: Switch the interface language from the dropdown in the header — English, 繁體中文, or 简体中文. Click the sun/moon icon to cycle Light → Dark → System theme.
manual_sec_help_body:
Full documentation, FAQ, and known issues:
github.com/SpaceSquare640/Multimedia_Downloader/wiki

Found a bug? Open an issue:
github.com/SpaceSquare640/Multimedia_Downloader/issues
log_clear_confirm_body: This removes every line currently shown. It can't be undone (export it first if you need a copy).
